sentences.en: He said that he was tired.
sentences.ro: A zis că era obosit.

sentences.en: He said that he was Romanian.
sentences.ro: A zis că e român.

sentences.en: She said that she worked in London.
sentences.ro: A zis că lucra la Londra.

sentences.en: The driver said that the road was closed.
sentences.ro: Șoferul a zis că drumul era închis.

sentences.en: My boss said that I had a new task.
sentences.ro: Șeful a zis că am o sarcină nouă.

sentences.en: He said that he would call me the next day.
sentences.ro: A zis că mă va suna a doua zi.

sentences.en: The doctor said that I had to rest.
sentences.ro: Doctorul a zis că trebuie să mă odihnesc.

sentences.en: She said she worked there.
sentences.ro: A zis că lucra acolo.

sentences.en: He said he could swim.
sentences.ro: A zis că știe să înoate.

sentences.en: She said it would rain.
sentences.ro: A zis că va ploua.

sentences.en: He said that he was 50 years old.
sentences.ro: A zis că are 50 de ani.

sentences.en: They said that they could help.
sentences.ro: Au zis că pot ajuta.

sentences.en: He said that he was happy.
sentences.ro: A zis că e fericit.

sentences.en: She said that she worked in a school.
sentences.ro: A zis că lucra la o școală.

sentences.en: The doctor said that I could go home.
sentences.ro: Doctorul a zis că pot pleca acasă.

sentences.en: They said they were ready.
sentences.ro: Au zis că erau gata.

sentences.en: She said she had a problem.
sentences.ro: A zis că are o problemă.

sentences.en: She said he had finished.
sentences.ro: A zis că el terminase deja.

sentences.en: He said he was working then.
sentences.ro: A zis că lucra atunci.

sentences.en: He said he had seen the film.
sentences.ro: A zis că văzuse filmul.

sentences.en: She said she would call me.
sentences.ro: A zis că mă va suna.

sentences.en: She said I had to wait.
sentences.ro: A zis că trebuie să aștept.

sentences.en: She said she was busy then.
sentences.ro: A zis că era ocupată atunci.

sentences.en: He said he had worked late the day before.
sentences.ro: A zis că lucrase până târziu cu o zi înainte.

sentences.en: She said she lived there.
sentences.ro: A zis că locuiește acolo.

sentences.en: He said he had bought that book.
sentences.ro: A zis că cumpărase cartea aceea.

sentences.en: She said she had seen him a week before.
sentences.ro: A zis că îl văzuse cu o săptămână înainte.

sentences.en: He said he would like a coffee.
sentences.ro: A zis că ar vrea o cafea.

sentences.en: She said he must be tired.
sentences.ro: A zis că probabil e obosit.

sentences.en: He said that he worked there.
sentences.ro: El a zis că lucra acolo.

sentences.en: She said that she would call the next day.
sentences.ro: Ea a zis că va suna a doua zi.

sentences.en: They said that they had finished.
sentences.ro: Au zis că au terminat.

sentences.en: He said that her head hurt.
sentences.ro: A zis că o doare capul.

sentences.en: He asked if I was tired.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă sunt obosit.

sentences.en: She asked if I worked there.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă lucrez acolo.

sentences.en: He asked if I could help him.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă îl pot ajuta.

sentences.en: She asked if the shop was open.
sentences.ro: A întrebat dacă magazinul era deschis.

sentences.en: He asked if I had finished.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă am terminat.

sentences.en: She asked if I would call her.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă o voi suna.

sentences.en: He asked whether I was Romanian.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă sunt român.

sentences.en: She asked if I had seen the email.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă am văzut emailul.

sentences.en: He asked where I lived.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat unde locuiesc.

sentences.en: She asked what I was doing.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat ce fac.

sentences.en: He asked when the meeting would start.
sentences.ro: A întrebat când începe ședința.

sentences.en: She asked why I was late.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat de ce am întârziat.

sentences.en: He asked how I had found that place.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat cum am găsit locul acela.

sentences.en: She asked who my manager was.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat cine e șeful meu.

sentences.en: He asked which file I had sent.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat ce fișier am trimis.

sentences.en: She asked how much it cost.
sentences.ro: A întrebat cât costă.

sentences.en: He asked if I was free the next day.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă sunt liber a doua zi.

sentences.en: She asked where the manager was.
sentences.ro: A întrebat unde e șeful.

sentences.en: He asked what time I would arrive.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat la ce oră ajung.

sentences.en: She told me to sit down.
sentences.ro: Mi-a spus să mă așez.

sentences.en: He told me to close the door.
sentences.ro: Mi-a spus să închid ușa.

sentences.en: She told them to wait for her.
sentences.ro: Le-a spus să o aștepte.

sentences.en: The boss told me to send the email then.
sentences.ro: Șeful mi-a spus să trimit emailul atunci.

sentences.en: She told us to be on time.
sentences.ro: Ne-a spus să fim punctuali.

sentences.en: He told me not to smoke there.
sentences.ro: Mi-a spus să nu fumez acolo.

sentences.en: She told them not to be late.
sentences.ro: Le-a spus să nu întârzie.

sentences.en: He told me not to worry.
sentences.ro: Mi-a spus să nu-mi fac griji.

sentences.en: He asked me to help him.
sentences.ro: M-a rugat să-l ajut.

sentences.en: She asked me to open the window.
sentences.ro: M-a rugat să deschid fereastra.

sentences.en: He asked me to call him back.
sentences.ro: M-a rugat să-l sun înapoi.

sentences.en: She asked me to send the file.
sentences.ro: M-a rugat să trimit fișierul.

sentences.en: He asked me to wait a moment.
sentences.ro: M-a rugat să aștept un moment.

sentences.en: The teacher told the students not to be late.
sentences.ro: Profesorul le-a spus elevilor să nu întârzie.

sentences.en: He told me that he was tired.
sentences.ro: Mi-a spus că era obosit.

sentences.en: She said hello and left.
sentences.ro: A spus salut și a plecat.

sentences.en: He told me a story.
sentences.ro: Mi-a spus o poveste.

sentences.en: The supervisor explained that the shipment was delayed.
sentences.ro: Șeful a explicat că livrarea a întârziat.

sentences.en: The customer complained that her order was wrong.
sentences.ro: Clienta s-a plâns că a primit comanda greșită.

sentences.en: He promised to send the invoice the next day.
sentences.ro: A promis că trimite factura a doua zi.

sentences.en: She suggested taking a short break.
sentences.ro: A sugerat să facem o pauză scurtă.

sentences.en: The manager agreed to meet on Monday.
sentences.ro: Șeful a fost de acord să se întâlnească luni.

sentences.en: He refused to work overtime.
sentences.ro: A refuzat să lucreze peste program.

sentences.en: She admitted that she had forgotten the meeting.
sentences.ro: A recunoscut că a uitat de ședință.

sentences.en: He denied that he had taken the keys.
sentences.ro: A negat că a luat cheile.

sentences.en: The doctor warned me not to skip my medication.
sentences.ro: Doctorul m-a avertizat să nu sar peste medicamente.

sentences.en: She reminded me to bring the documents.
sentences.ro: Mi-a amintit să aduc documentele.

sentences.en: The supervisor said that the shipment was delayed.
sentences.ro: Șeful a zis că livrarea a întârziat.

sentences.en: The boss said that we had a new client.
sentences.ro: Șeful a zis că avem un client nou.

sentences.en: The manager said the meeting was at 3 PM.
sentences.ro: Managerul a zis că ședința e la ora 15.

sentences.en: The supervisor told me not to be late the next day.
sentences.ro: Șeful mi-a spus să nu întârzii a doua zi.

sentences.en: The manager said that she would check the schedule.
sentences.ro: Managerul a zis că va verifica programul.

sentences.en: The customer complained that the product had arrived broken.
sentences.ro: Clientul s-a plâns că produsul a ajuns spart.

sentences.en: The customer complained that our service was too slow.
sentences.ro: Clientul s-a plâns că serviciul nostru e prea lent.

sentences.en: John complained that he was working too many hours.
sentences.ro: John s-a plâns că lucrează prea multe ore.

sentences.en: Maria said that the new system was impossible to use.
sentences.ro: Maria a zis că noul sistem e imposibil de folosit.

sentences.en: The boss said that the delivery was delayed.
sentences.ro: Șeful a zis că livrarea e amânată.

sentences.en: He asked me if I could work on Saturday.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă pot lucra sâmbătă.

sentences.en: He told me to send the report by Friday.
sentences.ro: Mi-a spus să trimit raportul până vineri.

sentences.en: He told me that he hadn't received the email.
sentences.ro: Mi-a zis că nu a primit emailul.

sentences.en: He asked me if I could help with the report.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă pot ajuta cu raportul.

sentences.en: The customer complained that the food was cold.
sentences.ro: Clientul s-a plâns că mâncarea era rece.

sentences.en: Rachel said that she had quit her job that morning.
sentences.ro: Rachel a zis că și-a dat demisia în dimineața aceea.

sentences.en: She explained that she didn't like her new manager.
sentences.ro: A explicat că nu-i place noul ei șef.

sentences.en: She asked her friends if she could stay with them.
sentences.ro: Le-a întrebat pe prietenele ei dacă poate sta cu ele.

sentences.en: The manager said we had a new client from Germany.
sentences.ro: Managerul a zis că avem un client nou din Germania.

sentences.en: She told us that we would meet them on Wednesday.
sentences.ro: Ne-a spus că îi vom întâlni miercuri.

sentences.en: The supervisor explained that the deadline had been moved to Thursday.
sentences.ro: Șeful a explicat că termenul a fost mutat pe joi.

sentences.en: The client complained that the documents were in Romanian.
sentences.ro: Clientul s-a plâns că documentele erau în română.

sentences.en: He asked us to send the English version.
sentences.ro: Ne-a rugat să trimitem versiunea în engleză.

sentences.en: The team promised that they would send the version.
sentences.ro: Echipa a promis că va trimite versiunea.

sentences.en: The client had signed the contract.
sentences.ro: Clientul semnase contractul.

sentences.en: She said that she had to leave then.
sentences.ro: A zis că trebuie să plece atunci.

sentences.en: He said that he had seen the film the day before.
sentences.ro: A zis că văzuse filmul cu o zi înainte.

sentences.en: He asked me if I could work the next day.
sentences.ro: M-a întrebat dacă pot lucra a doua zi.

sentences.en: He told me not to forget the meeting.
sentences.ro: Mi-a spus să nu uit întâlnirea.

sentences.en: The supervisor apologised for the deadline change.
sentences.ro: Șeful și-a cerut scuze pentru schimbarea termenului.

grammar.title: Vorbirea directă și vorbirea indirectă
grammar.body: Când repovestești ce a zis cineva, ai două variante. Poți repeta exact cuvintele lui, cu ghilimele - asta e vorbirea directă. Sau poți povesti cu vorbele tale, fără ghilimele - asta e vorbirea indirectă. Când treci de la una la alta, se întâmplă trei lucruri: ghilimelele dispar, pronumele se schimbă (eu devine el sau ea), iar verbul se mută cu un pas în trecut. Cuvântul that e opțional, poți să-l pui sau nu.

examples.en: He said that he was Romanian.
examples.ro: A zis că e român.

examples.en: She said that she worked in London.
examples.ro: A zis că lucra la Londra.

examples.en: The driver said that the road was closed.
examples.ro: Șoferul a zis că drumul era închis.

examples.en: He said that he would call me the next day.
examples.ro: A zis că mă va suna a doua zi.

grammar.title: Schimbarea pronumelor
grammar.body: Când repovestești, trebuie să te gândești cine vorbește acum (tu, cel care povestește) și despre cine se vorbește (el, ea, ei). De-aia I devine he sau she, my devine his sau her, we devine they. E ca în română, unde spunem el a zis că el e obosit, nu el a zis că eu sunt obosit. Dacă persoana chiar vorbește cu tine, you devine I sau me.

examples.en: He said that his car was broken.
examples.ro: A zis că mașina lui era stricată.

examples.en: She said that she needed help.
examples.ro: A zis că are nevoie de ajutor.

examples.en: They said that they were tired.
examples.ro: Au zis că erau obosiți.

examples.en: He said that I was right.
examples.ro: A zis că am dreptate.

grammar.title: De ce se schimbă timpul verbului
grammar.body: Dacă cineva a zis ceva în trecut, atunci ce a zis el e tot din trecut, chiar dacă atunci a fost spus la prezent. Engleza marchează asta mutând verbul cu un pas înapoi - asta se cheamă backshift. În română nu facem la fel de strict, la noi verbul rămâne de multe ori la prezent. În engleză însă trebuie mereu să dai un pas înapoi verbului.

examples.en: She said she worked there.
examples.ro: A zis că lucra acolo.

examples.en: He said he could swim.
examples.ro: A zis că știe să înoate.

examples.en: She said it would rain.
examples.ro: A zis că va ploua.

grammar.title: Regula de aur: un pas înapoi în timp
grammar.body: Dacă spui he said sau she said, adică ai zis totul la trecut, atunci tot ce a zis persoana se mută și el cu un pas în trecut. Am, is, are devin was sau were; do, does devin did; have, has devin had; will devine would; can devine could; must devine had to. E ca un tabel mecanic, îl aplici automat de fiecare dată.

examples.en: She said she had a problem.
examples.ro: A zis că are o problemă.

examples.en: He said he was working then.
examples.ro: A zis că lucra atunci.

examples.en: He said he had seen the film.
examples.ro: A zis că văzuse filmul.

examples.en: She said she would call me.
examples.ro: A zis că mă va suna.

examples.en: She said I had to wait.
examples.ro: A zis că trebuie să aștept.

grammar.title: Când NU faci backshift
grammar.body: Sunt două situații când nu muți verbul înapoi. Prima: dacă spui he says (la prezent, nu la trecut), nu faci deloc backshift. A doua: dacă ce a zis persoana e încă adevărat acum, sau e un adevăr general, poți păstra prezentul dacă vrei să subliniezi asta. Dar dacă nu ești sigur, cel mai sigur e să faci mereu backshift - varianta asta e mereu corectă.

examples.en: He says that he is tired.
examples.ro: Zice că e obosit.

examples.en: She said that the Earth is round.
examples.ro: A zis că Pământul e rotund.

examples.en: He said that he lives in London.
examples.ro: A zis că locuiește la Londra.

grammar.title: Cuvintele de timp și loc se schimbă și ele
grammar.body: Odată cu verbul, se schimbă și cuvintele care arată timpul și locul. Now devine then, today devine that day, tomorrow devine the next day, here devine there. Logica e simplă: dacă cineva a zis azi ieri, azi-ul lui e ieri-ul meu acum, din perspectiva mea de acum.

examples.en: She said she was busy then.
examples.ro: A zis că era ocupată atunci.

examples.en: He said he would call me the next day.
examples.ro: A zis că mă va suna a doua zi.

examples.en: He said he had worked late the day before.
examples.ro: A zis că lucrase până târziu cu o zi înainte.

examples.en: She said she lived there.
examples.ro: A zis că locuia acolo.

grammar.title: Întrebări da/nu: if sau whether
grammar.body: Când repovestești o întrebare la care se răspunde cu da sau nu, propoziția nu mai e o întrebare adevărată, ci mai degrabă o explicație. De-aia trebuie să adaugi if sau whether (înseamnă cam același lucru, whether e mai formal), iar semnul de întrebare dispare. Subiectul stă înaintea verbului, ca la o afirmație normală.

examples.en: He asked if I was tired.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat dacă eram obosit.

examples.en: She asked if I worked there.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat dacă lucram acolo.

examples.en: He asked if I could help him.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat dacă îl puteam ajuta.

examples.en: He asked whether I was Romanian.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat dacă eram român.

grammar.title: Întrebări cu what, where, when, why, how, who
grammar.body: Pentru întrebările cu what, where, when, why, how sau who, folosești același cuvânt de întrebare, dar nu mai pui if. Restul propoziției merge ca o afirmație obișnuită - subiect, apoi verb, fără ca verbul să sară în față.

examples.en: He asked where I lived.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat unde locuiam.

examples.en: She asked what I was doing.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat ce făceam.

examples.en: He asked when the meeting would start.
examples.ro: A întrebat când va începe ședința.

examples.en: She asked who my manager was.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat cine era șeful meu.

grammar.title: Nu mai e inversiune, iar do/does/did dispar
grammar.body: Cea mai mare capcană e că mulți români păstrează ordinea din întrebarea directă. Nu e corect. Odată ce repovestești, verbul nu mai sare înaintea subiectului, iar do, does, did dispar complet - verbul principal se descurcă singur, cu backshift dacă e cazul.

examples.en: She asked if I had finished.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat dacă terminasem.

examples.en: He asked why I was late.
examples.ro: M-a întrebat de ce am întârziat.

examples.en: She asked how much it cost.
examples.ro: A întrebat cât costa.

grammar.title: Comenzi: tell someone to + verb
grammar.body: O comandă în vorbire directă e doar verbul la imperativ, ca Close the door!. Când o repovestești, trebuie să spui cui i s-a zis și să pui verbul la forma to + verb: told me to close. Pentru negație, pui not înainte de to: told me not to be late.

examples.en: He told me to close the door.
examples.ro: Mi-a spus să închid ușa.

examples.en: She told them not to be late.
examples.ro: Le-a spus să nu întârzie.

examples.en: He told me not to worry.
examples.ro: Mi-a spus să nu-mi fac griji.

examples.en: The boss told me to send the email then.
examples.ro: Șeful mi-a spus să trimit emailul atunci.

grammar.title: Cereri politicoase: ask someone to + verb
grammar.body: O cerere politicoasă (cu could you, can you, please) se repovestește la fel ca o comandă, dar cu ask în loc de tell: asked me to help. Cuvintele de politețe dispar, pentru că verbul ask arată deja că a fost o rugăminte, nu un ordin.

examples.en: He asked me to help him.
examples.ro: M-a rugat să-l ajut.

examples.en: She asked me to open the window.
examples.ro: M-a rugat să deschid fereastra.

examples.en: He asked me to call him back.
examples.ro: M-a rugat să-l sun înapoi.

examples.en: She asked me not to tell anyone.
examples.ro: M-a rugat să nu spun nimănui.

grammar.title: Say fără obiect, tell cu obiect
grammar.body: Tell are mereu nevoie de cineva căruia îi spui ceva (obiect): told me, told him. Say de obicei nu are acest obiect direct: said that he was tired. Dacă totuși vrei să spui cui i s-a zis folosind say, adaugi to: said to me.

examples.en: He told me that he was tired.
examples.ro: Mi-a spus că era obosit.

examples.en: He said that he was tired.
examples.ro: A zis că era obosit.

examples.en: He said to me that he was tired.
examples.ro: Mi-a zis că era obosit.

grammar.title: Expresii fixe cu tell
grammar.body: Câteva expresii merg numai cu tell, niciodată cu say: tell the truth, tell a lie, tell a story, tell a joke, tell the time. Nu poți spune say the truth, e mereu tell the truth.

examples.en: He told me a story.
examples.ro: Mi-a spus o poveste.

examples.en: She always tells the truth.
examples.ro: Ea spune mereu adevărul.

examples.en: Can you tell the time?
examples.ro: Știi să citești ceasul?

grammar.title: Alte verbe de raportare
grammar.body: Pe lângă say, tell și ask, engleza are multe alte verbe pentru a repovesti ceva, și fiecare are propria lui structură: explain that, complain that, promise to, suggest -ing, refuse to, admit sau deny that, warn (not) to, remind to. Învățându-le, poți suna mult mai natural decât dacă folosești mereu doar said.

examples.en: The supervisor explained that the shipment was delayed.
examples.ro: Șeful a explicat că livrarea a întârziat.

examples.en: The customer complained that her order was wrong.
examples.ro: Clienta s-a plâns că a primit comanda greșită.

examples.en: He promised to send the invoice the next day.
examples.ro: A promis că va trimite factura a doua zi.

examples.en: She suggested taking a short break.
examples.ro: A sugerat să facem o pauză scurtă.

examples.en: He refused to work overtime.
examples.ro: A refuzat să lucreze peste program.

examples.en: She reminded me to bring the documents.
examples.ro: Mi-a amintit să aduc documentele.

grammar.title: Cum relatezi un mesaj de la șef
grammar.body: La birou, când șeful îți spune ceva și trebuie să transmiți unui coleg, urmezi trei pași: asculți atent ce zice șeful, apoi începi cu The boss said that... sau The supervisor told me that..., și aplici backshift ca de obicei.

examples.en: The supervisor said that the shipment was delayed.
examples.ro: Șeful a zis că livrarea a întârziat.

examples.en: The manager said that she would check the schedule.
examples.ro: Managerul a zis că va verifica programul.

examples.en: The boss told me to finish the report by Friday.
examples.ro: Șeful mi-a spus să termin raportul până vineri.

grammar.title: Informația care nu se schimbă rămâne la prezent
grammar.body: Informațiile care nu se schimbă cu timpul, cum ar fi un număr de telefon sau o adresă, rămân la prezent chiar și în vorbirea indirectă. Doar verbele de comunicare (a zis, a întrebat, a cerut) suferă backshift, nu și faptele care sunt tot adevărate acum.

examples.en: His number is 0744 123 456.
examples.ro: Numărul lui este 0744 123 456.

examples.en: He said that he had tried to reach you.
examples.ro: A zis că a încercat să te contacteze.

examples.en: He asked you to call him back that day.
examples.ro: Te-a rugat să-l suni înapoi în ziua aceea.

grammar.title: Raportezi o plângere cu complain
grammar.body: Când un client sau un coleg se plânge de ceva, iar tu trebuie să raportezi mai departe managerului, folosești verbul complain urmat de that: complained that the product was broken. E un verb foarte util pentru situații reale de la job.

examples.en: The customer complained that the product had arrived broken.
examples.ro: Clientul s-a plâns că produsul a ajuns spart.

examples.en: John complained that he was working too many hours.
examples.ro: John s-a plâns că lucrează prea multe ore.

examples.en: The customer complained that our service was too slow.
examples.ro: Clientul s-a plâns că serviciul nostru e prea lent.

grammar.title: Repovestirea cu voce tare (narrative shadowing)
grammar.body: Cel mai bun exercițiu pentru vorbirea indirectă e să repovestești cu voce tare ce tocmai ai văzut sau auzit, folosind propriile tale cuvinte. Vezi un scurt fragment de film sau videoclip, oprești, și spui She said that... sau He explained that.... Asta obligă creierul să producă structura, nu doar s-o recunoască.

examples.en: Rachel said that she had quit her job that morning.
examples.ro: Rachel a zis că și-a dat demisia în dimineața aceea.

examples.en: She explained that she didn't like her new manager.
examples.ro: A explicat că nu-i place noul ei șef.

examples.en: The song says that he left home.
examples.ro: Cântecul spune că a plecat de acasă.

grammar.title: Recapitulare: toate regulile împreună
grammar.body: La finalul cărții, toate regulile se combină: schimbi pronumele, muți verbul cu un pas în trecut, schimbi cuvintele de timp și loc, și alegi verbul de raportare potrivit (said, told, asked, explained, promised, complained). Dacă poți face toate astea deodată, într-o poveste reală de la birou, ai stăpânit vorbirea indirectă.

examples.en: The manager said we had a new client from Germany.
examples.ro: Managerul a zis că avem un client nou din Germania.

examples.en: The client complained that the documents were in Romanian.
examples.ro: Clientul s-a plâns că documentele erau în română.

examples.en: The team promised that they would send the version.
examples.ro: Echipa a promis că va trimite versiunea.

traps.wrong: He said which he was tired.
traps.right: He said that he was tired.
traps.why: După say sau tell, folosești that sau nimic, niciodată which.

traps.wrong: He said what he is tired.
traps.right: He said that he was tired.
traps.why: What nu introduce niciodată o propoziție după say sau tell, și oricum e nevoie de backshift: is devine was.

traps.wrong: He said that he is tired.
traps.right: He said that he was tired.
traps.why: În engleză se face mereu backshift, chiar dacă în română păstrăm prezentul (a zis că e obosit).

traps.wrong: He said he had liked a coffee.
traps.right: He said he would like a coffee.
traps.why: Would e deja o formă de trecut, nu se mai mută încă un pas înapoi.

traps.wrong: She said he had to be tired.
traps.right: She said he must be tired.
traps.why: Must de deducție (probabil e obosit) nu se schimbă; doar must de obligație devine had to.

traps.wrong: He asked where is the office.
traps.right: He asked where the office was.
traps.why: În întrebarea indirectă verbul nu mai sare înaintea subiectului.

traps.right: She asked if I was tired.
traps.why: La întrebările da/nu trebuie adăugat if, fără inversiune.

traps.wrong: He asked do I work here.
traps.right: He asked if I worked there.
traps.why: Do, does, did dispar complet în întrebarea indirectă.

traps.wrong: She asked what time is it.
traps.right: She asked what time it was.
traps.why: Ordinea revine la subiect + verb, ca într-o afirmație obișnuită.

traps.wrong: He told me that to close the door.
traps.right: He told me to close the door.
traps.why: Nu amesteci that (pentru informații) cu to + verb (pentru comenzi) - sunt structuri diferite.
Pentru comenzi se folosește tell, niciodată say.

traps.wrong: He told to close the door.
traps.right: He told me to close the door.
traps.why: Tell cere mereu un obiect - trebuie să spui cui i s-a zis.

dialogues.title: La birou — mesajul șefului
dialogues.scene: Un coleg vrea să afle ce a zis șeful la ședința de dimineață.

lines.en: What did the boss say about the deadline?
lines.ro: Ce a zis șeful despre termenul limită?

lines.en: He said that the deadline was Friday.
lines.ro: A zis că termenul limită era vineri.
wrong: He said that the deadline is Friday.
He told that the deadline was Friday.

lines.en: Did he ask you to send the report today?
lines.ro: Te-a rugat să trimiți raportul azi?

lines.en: Yes, he asked me to send it today.
lines.ro: Da, m-a rugat să-l trimit azi.
wrong: Yes, he asked me sending it today.
Yes, he said me to send it today.

lines.en: Did he say if the meeting was cancelled?
lines.ro: A zis dacă ședința a fost anulată?

lines.en: He said that the meeting wasn't cancelled.
lines.ro: A zis că ședința nu a fost anulată.
wrong: He said if the meeting wasn't cancelled.
He said that the meeting isn't cancelled.

lines.en: What did he tell you about tomorrow?
lines.ro: Ce ți-a spus despre mâine?

lines.en: He told me not to be late tomorrow.
lines.ro: Mi-a spus să nu întârzii mâine.
wrong: He told me to not be late tomorrow.
He said me not to be late tomorrow.

lines.en: Did he explain why the deadline changed?
lines.ro: A explicat de ce s-a schimbat termenul?

lines.en: Yes, he explained that the client had asked for more time.
lines.ro: Da, a explicat că clientul ceruse mai mult timp.
wrong: Yes, he explained why the client asked for more time.
Yes, he explained that the client asks for more time.

dialogues.title: Un mesaj telefonic pentru Anna
dialogues.scene: Managerul te întreabă ce a spus un client care a sunat pentru colega ta, Anna.

lines.en: Did someone call for Anna this morning?
lines.ro: A sunat cineva pentru Anna în dimineața asta?

lines.en: Yes, a client called and asked if Anna was in the office.
lines.ro: Da, a sunat un client și a întrebat dacă Anna era la birou.
wrong: Yes, a client called and asked if Anna is in the office.
Yes, a client called and asked was Anna in the office.

lines.en: What did he ask you to tell her?
lines.ro: Ce te-a rugat să-i spui?

lines.en: He asked me to tell her to call him back.
lines.ro: M-a rugat să-i spun să-l sune înapoi.
wrong: He asked me tell her to call him back.
He told me to tell her call him back.

lines.en: Did he say when he needed the callback?
lines.ro: A zis când avea nevoie de apelul de răspuns?

lines.en: He said that he needed it before five o'clock.
lines.ro: A zis că avea nevoie de el înainte de ora cinci.
wrong: He said that he needs it before five o'clock.
He said if he needed it before five o'clock.

lines.en: Did he complain about anything?
lines.ro: S-a plâns de ceva?

lines.en: Yes, he complained that nobody had answered his email.
lines.ro: Da, s-a plâns că nimeni nu-i răspunsese la email.
wrong: Yes, he complained that nobody answered his email.
Yes, he complained if nobody had answered his email.

lines.en: Did you promise to pass on the message?
lines.ro: Ai promis că vei transmite mesajul?

lines.en: Yes, I promised to give her the message today.
lines.ro: Da, am promis să-i dau mesajul azi.
wrong: Yes, I promised that I give her the message today.
Yes, I promised giving her the message today.

dialogues.title: Plângerea unei cliente despre livr
dialogues.scene: Managerul te întreabă ce s-a plâns o clientă în legătură cu o livrare întârziată.

lines.en: Did a customer complain about anything today?
lines.ro: S-a plâns vreun client de ceva azi?

lines.en: Yes, a customer complained that her delivery was two days late.
lines.ro: Da, o clientă s-a plâns că livrarea ei era întârziată cu două zile.
wrong: Yes, a customer complained that her delivery is two days late.
Yes, a customer complained if her delivery was two days late.

lines.en: Did she say anything about the product itself?
lines.ro: A zis ceva despre produsul în sine?

lines.en: She said that the box had arrived damaged.
lines.ro: A zis că cutia ajunsese deteriorată.
wrong: She said that the box has arrived damaged.
She told that the box had arrived damaged.

lines.en: What did she ask you to do?
lines.ro: Ce te-a rugat să faci?

lines.en: She asked me to send a replacement as soon as possible.
lines.ro: M-a rugat să trimit un înlocuitor cât mai curând posibil.
wrong: She asked me sending a replacement as soon as possible.
She asked to send a replacement as soon as possible.

lines.en: Did she ask if we could refund the delivery cost?
lines.ro: A întrebat dacă putem rambursa costul livrării?

lines.en: Yes, she asked if we could refund the delivery cost.
lines.ro: Da, a întrebat dacă putem rambursa costul livrării.
wrong: Yes, she asked could we refund the delivery cost.
Yes, she asked if we can refund the delivery cost.

lines.en: Did you promise anything?
lines.ro: Ai promis ceva?

lines.en: Yes, I promised to send the replacement today.
lines.ro: Da, am promis să trimit înlocuitorul azi.
wrong: Yes, I promised that I send the replacement today.
Yes, I promised sending the replacement today.

lines.en: Did she mention when she needed it?
lines.ro: A menționat când avea nevoie de el?

lines.en: She mentioned that she needed it before the weekend.
lines.ro: A menționat că avea nevoie de el înainte de weekend.
wrong: She mentioned that she needs it before the weekend.
She mentioned if she needed it before the weekend.

dialogues.title: Nota de la sediul central despre ș
dialogues.scene: Un coleg te întreabă ce ai aflat dintr-un mesaj de la sediul central despre schimbarea ședinței.

lines.en: Did head office call about the meeting?
lines.ro: A sunat sediul central despre ședință?

lines.en: Yes, David called and said that the meeting had been moved to Wednesday.
lines.ro: Da, a sunat David și a zis că ședința fusese mutată pe miercuri.
wrong: Yes, David called and said that the meeting has been moved to Wednesday.
Yes, David called and told that the meeting had been moved to Wednesday.

lines.en: What time did he say the meeting would start?
lines.ro: La ce oră a zis că va începe ședința?

lines.en: He said that it would start at eleven o'clock.
lines.ro: A zis că va începe la ora unsprezece.
wrong: He said that it will start at eleven o'clock.
He said what time it would start at eleven o'clock.

lines.en: Did he ask you to bring anything?
lines.ro: Te-a rugat să aduci ceva?

lines.en: Yes, he asked me to bring the sales figures for last quarter.
lines.ro: Da, m-a rugat să aduc cifrele de vânzări pentru trimestrul trecut.
wrong: Yes, he asked me bringing the sales figures for last quarter.
Yes, he asked bring the sales figures for last quarter.

lines.en: Did he explain why the meeting was moved?
lines.ro: A explicat de ce a fost mutată ședința?

lines.en: He explained that the manager wasn't free on Tuesday.
lines.ro: A explicat că managerul nu era liber marți.
wrong: He explained that the manager isn't free on Tuesday.
He explained if the manager wasn't free on Tuesday.

lines.en: Did he remind you about anything else?
lines.ro: Ți-a amintit despre altceva?

lines.en: Yes, he reminded me to send the update before the meeting.
lines.ro: Da, mi-a amintit să trimit actualizarea înainte de ședință.
wrong: Yes, he reminded me sending the update before the meeting.
Yes, he reminded to send the update before the meeting.

lines.en: Did you promise to be there on time?
lines.ro: Ai promis că vei fi acolo la timp?

lines.en: Yes, I promised to arrive at eleven o'clock.
lines.ro: Da, am promis să ajung la ora unsprezece.
wrong: Yes, I promised that I arrive at eleven o'clock.
Yes, I promised arriving at eleven o'clock.

writing.prompt: Relatează o conversație reală (sau imaginată) pe care ai avut-o recent cu șeful sau cu un coleg. Ce a zis? Ce te-a întrebat? Ce te-a rugat să faci?
writing.modelEn: Yesterday I spoke to my manager about the new project. She said that the deadline was Friday. She asked if I could finish the report by then. She also told me to send her an update every day. I promised to do my best. In the end, she thanked me for my work.
writing.modelRo: Ieri am vorbit cu managera mea despre noul proiect. A zis că termenul limită era vineri. M-a întrebat dacă pot termina raportul până atunci. Mi-a spus și să-i trimit o actualizare în fiecare zi. Am promis că voi face tot posibilul. Până la urmă, mi-a mulțumit pentru muncă.
tips: Backshift: is/are devine was/were, will devine would.
După ask folosește if, nu do/does (fără inversiune).
După tell pui persoana (me, him, her) înainte de to + verb.

writing.prompt: Scrie despre un apel telefonic recent la muncă (real sau imaginat): ce a spus persoana care a sunat, ce te-a rugat și ce i-ai promis.
starters: Yesterday a client called the office...
writing.modelEn: Yesterday a client called the office. He said that the product had arrived broken. He asked me to send a replacement quickly. He also asked if the manager was available. I told him that she would call back the next day. He thanked me and finished the call.
writing.modelRo: Ieri un client a sunat la birou. A zis că produsul ajunsese spart. M-a rugat să trimit repede un înlocuitor. A întrebat și dacă managerul era disponibil. I-am spus că ea îl va suna înapoi a doua zi. Mi-a mulțumit și a încheiat apelul.
tips: Cu complain/say folosește that, nu if.
Verbul principal preia backshift-ul; do/does/did dispar în întrebările indirecte.
Cuvintele de timp se schimbă: tomorrow devine the next day.

readings.title: O săptămână aglomerată la birou
readings.text: Last week was very busy at the office. On Monday, the manager said that the company had a new client, a large firm from Germany. She told the team that they would meet the client on Wednesday and asked everyone to prepare a short presentation. On Tuesday, the supervisor came to my desk and explained that the deadline for the monthly report had been moved from Wednesday to Thursday. He apologised and said it was not his decision. On Wednesday, the team met the German client as planned. During the meeting, the client complained that the documents he had received were written in Romanian instead of English. He asked the team to send him the English version by the end of the day. The team promised that they would send it immediately. Later, my colleague Maria mentioned that she had already translated most of the pages the week before, so the job was quick. By Friday evening, everyone was tired but happy, because the client had finally signed the contract.

questions.q: What did the manager say on Monday morning?
options: That the company had a new client from Germany
That the meeting had been cancelled
That the office would close on Wednesday
That everyone had finished the report

questions.q: What did the client complain about during the Wednesday meeting?
options: That the documents were in Romanian instead of English
That the meeting started too late
That the presentation was too long
That the report had not been written

questions.q: What had happened by Friday evening?
options: The client had signed the contract
The team had missed the deadline
The supervisor had left the company
Maria had lost the translated pages

readings.title: O zi dificilă cu livrările
readings.text: On Thursday morning, the delivery driver called the office before leaving. He warned the manager that the main road to the warehouse had been closed because of an accident. He said that he would use a different route, but that the delivery might arrive an hour later than planned. The manager thanked him and asked him to call again once he arrived. At lunchtime, a colleague from the warehouse team admitted that she had forgotten to check the last order before it was sent. She explained that she had been very busy that morning and had made a mistake with the address. The manager was not happy, but he did not shout. Instead, he reminded the whole team to double-check every address before sending a delivery. Later that afternoon, the driver called again and confirmed that he had arrived safely, although one hour late. He also mentioned that the road would probably reopen the next day. By the end of the day, the manager agreed that, despite the problems, the team had handled a difficult situation well.

questions.q: What did the driver warn the manager about?
options: That the main road to the warehouse had been closed
That the warehouse was closed for the day
That the delivery van had broken down
That there was no fuel for the truck

questions.q: What mistake did the colleague admit to?
options: That she had forgotten to check the last order's address
That she had missed the morning meeting
That she had sent the wrong invoice
That she had lost the delivery documents

questions.q: What did the manager remind the team to do?
options: To double-check every address before sending a delivery
To call the driver every hour
To finish all orders before lunch
To take a different road every day
